reasoning: The FedRAMP AC-17 control focuses on securing remote access, which in a Kubernetes context translates to ensuring that network access to the cluster and its services is tightly controlled. This involves using NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that services exposed via LoadBalancer are restricted to specific IP ranges, and that Ingress resources use TLS to secure data in transit. These measures help prevent unauthorized remote access to Kubernetes resources.
title: Remote Access
